title: Respond to emergencies
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Respond to emergencies demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for emergency situations

pcs.text: Identify potential workplace emergency situations and appropriate responses
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential workplace emergency situations and appropriate responses?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential workplace emergency situations and appropriate responses.

pcs.text: Identify emergency resources and their location in the work area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify emergency resources and their location in the work area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify emergency resources and their location in the work area.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use, maintain and store personal protective equipment (PPE) and safety and communications equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use, maintain and store personal protective equipment (PPE) and safety and communications equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use, maintain and store personal protective equipment (PPE) and safety and communications equipment.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable safety and communications equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report unserviceable safety and communications equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable safety and communications equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for emergency situations

elements.title: Identify and evaluate the emergency

pcs.text: Recognise and assess the identified or potential emergency situation risks, and effectiveness of initial response actions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and assess the identified or potential emergency situation risks, and effectiveness of initial response actions.

pcs.text: Seek advice in evaluating the emergency from appropriate personnel

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice in evaluating the emergency from appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Determine emergency needs and priority, including any assistance that may be required

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine emergency needs and priority, including any assistance that may be required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify and evaluate the emergency

elements.title: Implement fire protection and control procedures

pcs.text: Minimise the risk of fire hazards and any hazardous fuelling procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise the risk of fire hazards and any hazardous fuelling procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise the risk of fire hazards and any hazardous fuelling procedures.

pcs.text: Carry out workplace safety procedures for the handling and use of industrial gases
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out workplace safety procedures for the handling and use of industrial gases?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out workplace safety procedures for the handling and use of industrial gases.

pcs.text: Use fire extinguishers and equipment appropriate to the fire situation, and notify authorities where applicable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use fire extinguishers and equipment appropriate to the fire situation, and notify authorities where applicable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use fire extinguishers and equipment appropriate to the fire situation, and notify authorities where applicable.

pcs.text: Follow procedures for evacuation to nominated assembly points
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow procedures for evacuation to nominated assembly points?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow procedures for evacuation to nominated assembly points.

elements.title: Confine the emergency where possible

pcs.text: Confine emergency to the immediate area using available resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confine emergency to the immediate area using available resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confine emergency to the immediate area using available resources.

pcs.text: Carry out emergency procedures, and operate equipment using safe work practices

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out emergency procedures, and operate equipment using safe work practices.

pcs.text: Use equipment safely in conjunction with other emergency actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use equipment safely in conjunction with other emergency actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use equipment safely in conjunction with other emergency actions.

pcs.text: Assist with the evacuation of personnel and animals

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with the evacuation of personnel and animals.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide information required to assist emergency services.

elements.title: Control the emergency situation

pcs.text: Evacuate casualties following workplace emergency procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evacuate casualties following workplace emergency procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evacuate casualties following workplace emergency procedures.

pcs.text: Minimise the risk to self and casualties by minimising and isolating hazards where possible
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise the risk to self and casualties by minimising and isolating hazards where possible?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise the risk to self and casualties by minimising and isolating hazards where possible.

pcs.text: Seek first aid assistance and advice where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek first aid assistance and advice where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek first aid assistance and advice where necessary.

pcs.text: Record and report emergency situation response actions to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report emergency situation response actions to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report emergency situation response actions to supervisor.

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
